overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded character walking through a sunlit ancient Egyptian city with white stone architecture, cobblestone streets, and scattered NPCs. The character ascends a slope past red banners, navigates around a tall obelisk monument, and proceeds through a grand avenue lined with sphinx statues and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone street ascending toward obelisk monument

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the sloped cobblestone street toward the tall obelisk monument visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: dog standing in the middle of the street ahead

entered.detail: large white stone building with stairs and columns at the top of the slope
stone steps leading up to the villa entrance
tall dark green cypress trees behind the villa walls
tall whitewashed walls with climbing ivy on the left side of the street
vertical red banners hanging from poles along the left wall
tall stone column monument with statue on top visible at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks up a sloped cobblestone street flanked by white plaster walls and red banners. A dog stands in the path ahead, and a large white stone villa with cypress trees is visible at the top of the hill. The tall obelisk monument dominates the view in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection area with tall obelisk monument

events.description: soldier on horseback rides past from right to left
character turns right at the intersection around the obelisk base

agents.ego_description: navigating around the base of the obelisk and turning right at the intersection

notable_agents.action: soldier on horseback riding past the character from right to left

entered.detail: large building with corinthian columns and triangular pediment
decorated stone base of the obelisk monument
building with domed roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the top of the slope and navigates around the base of the tall obelisk monument. A soldier on horseback rides past as the character turns right at the intersection, revealing a large Corinthian temple on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street between high whitewashed walls

events.description: character begins following a child running ahead down the street

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow street following a child who is running ahead

notable_agents.action: child running ahead of the character down the street

entered.detail: wooden market stall with canopy on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a narrow street enclosed by high whitewashed walls on both sides, following a child running ahead. The tall obelisk remains visible in the distance, and a market stall appears on the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand ceremonial avenue with sphinx statues and palm trees

events.description: entering the open grand avenue lined with palm trees and sphinx statues

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand avenue observing the sphinx statues and palm trees lining the path

notable_agents.action: person sitting near the base of the sphinx statue

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the center of the avenue
large stone sphinx statue on pedestal to the left of the avenue
grand building with tall columns on the left side
row of market stalls with blue canopies on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide grand avenue lined with palm trees and massive sphinx statues. The tall obelisk remains visible further down the path, while market stalls with blue canopies line the right side and a grand columned building stands on the left. The scene opens up to full sky visibility with scattered pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit Egyptian city, transitioning from a narrow sloped street into a sprawling grand avenue. It begins as the character ascends a cobblestone path flanked by white walls and red banners, moving past a dog toward a large villa and a distant, towering obelisk. As the character reaches the summit and navigates around the base of the obelisk, a soldier on horseback rides past before the path turns right to reveal a large Corinthian temple. The scene then tightens as the camera follows a running child down a narrow street enclosed by high whitewashed walls and market stalls, keeping the obelisk as a distant landmark. Finally, the environment opens up into a wide avenue lined with palm trees and massive sphinx statues, where blue-canopied stalls and grand columned buildings stretch toward a clear, open sky.
